scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key gold standard points: temp_model(), deploy(), wait(), all_active, all_agents_idle, combined lambda check, successes parameter. Extra details (config, constraints, channel, trust) are valid Juju concepts.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout as an instance attribute appears fabricated — gold standard shows timeout as a parameter to wait(), not an instance attribute. The app= named parameter to deploy() is also uncertain.
